---
title: "Evaluating Prediction Intervals"
subtitle: "Study Using the M3 Competition Dataset"
author: "Igor Faluhelyi"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
devtools::load_all(".")
library(Mcomp)
library(parallel)
library(doParallel)
library(iterators)

# cluster config
cl <- makeCluster(detectCores(logical = FALSE))
registerDoParallel(cl)

# load local forecTheta for each node and export those functions
clusterEvalQ(cl, devtools::load_all("."))
clusterExport(cl, c("dotm", "dstm", "otm", "stm"))

out_dotm <- foreach(
  i = 1:3003, .packages = c("foreach", "forecast", "Mcomp")
) %dopar% {
  x <- M3[[i]]$x
  h <- M3[[i]]$h
  f <- dotm(y = x, h = h)
}

out_dstm <- foreach(
  i = 1:3003, .packages = c("foreach", "forecast", "Mcomp")
) %dopar% {
  x <- M3[[i]]$x
  h <- M3[[i]]$h
  f <- dstm(y = x, h = h)
}

out_otm <- foreach(
  i = 1:3003, .packages = c("foreach", "forecast", "Mcomp")
) %dopar% {
  x <- M3[[i]]$x
  h <- M3[[i]]$h
  f <- otm(y = x, h = h)
}

out_stm <- foreach(
  i = 1:3003, .packages = c("foreach", "forecast", "Mcomp")
) %dopar% {
  x <- M3[[i]]$x
  h <- M3[[i]]$h
  f <- stm(y = x, h = h)
}

stopCluster(cl)

# models out list
out <- list(out_stm, out_otm, out_dstm, out_dotm)
```

# Modelos sem \textit{bagging}

## STM

```{r}
lo <- matrix(NA, nrow=3003, ncol=18)
hi <- matrix(NA, nrow=3003, ncol=18)
obs = matrix(NA, nrow=3003, ncol=18) #matrix of the out-sample values

coverage_rates <- c()
for(i in 1:3003){
  x=M3[[i]]$x
  h=M3[[i]]$h
  obs[i, 1:h] = M3[[i]]$xx
  lo[i, 1:h] = out_stm[[i]]$lower[, 3] #.95 interval
  hi[i, 1:h] = out_stm[[i]]$upper[, 3] #.95 interval
  
  coverage_rates <- c(
    coverage_rates,
    calculate_coverage_rate(obs[i, 1:h], lo[i, 1:h], hi[i, 1:h])
  )
}

results <- evaluate_coverage_rates(coverage_rates)

results$summary
```



## OTM

```{r}
lo <- matrix(NA, nrow=3003, ncol=18)
hi <- matrix(NA, nrow=3003, ncol=18)
obs = matrix(NA, nrow=3003, ncol=18) #matrix of the out-sample values

coverage_rates <- c()
for(i in 1:3003){
  x=M3[[i]]$x
  h=M3[[i]]$h
  obs[i, 1:h] = M3[[i]]$xx
  lo[i, 1:h] = out_otm[[i]]$lower[, 3] #.95 interval
  hi[i, 1:h] = out_otm[[i]]$upper[, 3] #.95 interval
  
  coverage_rates <- c(
    coverage_rates,
    calculate_coverage_rate(obs[i, 1:h], lo[i, 1:h], hi[i, 1:h])
  )
}

results <- evaluate_coverage_rates(coverage_rates)

results$summary
```

## DSTM

```{r}
lo <- matrix(NA, nrow=3003, ncol=18)
hi <- matrix(NA, nrow=3003, ncol=18)
obs = matrix(NA, nrow=3003, ncol=18) #matrix of the out-sample values

coverage_rates <- c()
for(i in 1:3003){
  x=M3[[i]]$x
  h=M3[[i]]$h
  obs[i, 1:h] = M3[[i]]$xx
  lo[i, 1:h] = out_dstm[[i]]$lower[, 3] #.95 interval
  hi[i, 1:h] = out_dstm[[i]]$upper[, 3] #.95 interval
  
  coverage_rates <- c(
    coverage_rates,
    calculate_coverage_rate(obs[i, 1:h], lo[i, 1:h], hi[i, 1:h])
  )
}

results <- evaluate_coverage_rates(coverage_rates)

results$summary
```

## DOTM

```{r}
lo <- matrix(NA, nrow=3003, ncol=18)
hi <- matrix(NA, nrow=3003, ncol=18)
obs = matrix(NA, nrow=3003, ncol=18) #matrix of the out-sample values

coverage_rates <- c()
for(i in 1:3003){
  x=M3[[i]]$x
  h=M3[[i]]$h
  obs[i, 1:h] = M3[[i]]$xx
  lo[i, 1:h] = out_dotm[[i]]$lower[, 3] #.95 interval
  hi[i, 1:h] = out_dotm[[i]]$upper[, 3] #.95 interval
  
  coverage_rates <- c(
    coverage_rates,
    calculate_coverage_rate(obs[i, 1:h], lo[i, 1:h], hi[i, 1:h])
  )
}

results <- evaluate_coverage_rates(coverage_rates)

results$summary
```
